title: カフェテリア戦線異状なし

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In Tracen Academy's cafeteria, where untold
battles take place day in and day out...

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
I'll be working here starting today! It's nice to
meet you all!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, another rookie steps up to the plate... Try
your best not to get cooked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Right at that moment, the cafeteria bell rings!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What should I have today? I feel quite hungry, so
maybe I'll get a little extra...

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
(That warning earlier was a little harsh, so I was
expecting the worst. But this doesn't seem so
bad...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll have a large omelet rice, some Napolitan
spaghetti... and a carrot to top it off.

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text: What?! You're going to eat all that by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
If that shocks you, you're in for a real surprise.
Here comes the Ruler of Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew, I'm starviiing. What should I eat today? ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hm, the mapo tofu looks delicious, and the pork
cutlet bowl looks just as good... Okay, I've made
my mind up! It all looks good, so I'll have
everything!

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text: E-everything?!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Burn this moment into your mind. This is the
power of the one who stands before you—Ruler
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text: What was that sound?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text: She's here... She's coming!

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text: Who's here?! Who's coming?!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text: The Beast... Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hrm... How embarrassing. I bet everyone heard
my stomach just now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Anyway, what should I eat today?

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Oh... It looks like she's having trouble deciding.
That's better than ordering everything off the
menu...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text: You don't get it, do you? The moment she decides what to eat is the moment that item goes off the menu.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm, I'm feeling like some hamburger steak today.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Run, rookie! Get me the ground meat, carrots,
onions, and everything else that dish calls for!
Just bring anything we can turn into a hamburger
steak!

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text: R-roger that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the passage of time comes the gentle lull of
the bell, signaling the end of lunch.

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... It's over... I didn't think it'd be this hard...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think, rookie? Gonna put in a transfer
request?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The food today was delicious. See you next time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I can never get enough of the food
here. It always tastes so great!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Phew. Thank you cooking for us. I'm always
grateful.

text_block_list.name: Newbie Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
...I can do it! I'll work hard to put a smile on their
faces!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Then quit standing around and help me
prep for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every day, these warriors of the kitchen fight to
protect the smiles of the students, and their
battle yet rages on!
